title: TensuraJS
description: Fixes the Tensura Reincarnated Mod, Makes it Scriptable, Heavily Improves It
body:
Other addons may claim to have similar features but they copied this mod's code before/after release
Breaking the license of the mod could result in the server hosting it aswell as the person who broke the TOS being removed of access to use the mod. This is appealable in the discord: https://discord.gg/CASmzp4k5b

This mod is built with Proguard Java Obfuscator

Illegal modification, redistribution, or theft of code from this mod will result in access to the mod being revoked as well as possible legal action.

- Super Dynamic KubeJS X Tensura/Manascore API Compat
- Proper scriptable skill obtainment blockers
- Proper scriptable awakening blockers
- HEAVY Tensura optimizations
- HEAVY Manascore optimizations
- Heavy Tensura Bug fixes
- Heavy manascore Bug Fixes
- Heavy CNPCs network lag fix
- Scriptable Quest Menu (Soon to be deprecated by the FTBQuests compat)
- Support all things Tensura
- Register simple custom skills/races with KubeJS
- Customizable improved truly unique
- Modpack backdoor checking service for Hihi'Irokane plan and up
- Amazing TPS improvements from base
- Neruina improvements to also improve TPS while staying safe from ticking entities
- AI Optimization to reduce lag for players
- Faster battlewill and Reset scroll usage, reducing network lag of tensura join events by preventing mass rejoins.
- Stackable low, high, and full potions and reset scrolls
- FTBQuests New Tasks/Rewards/Options
- Special FTBTeams Tensura Compat

This is a server utility mod, the free edition can be used freely in singleplayer, to host a server with this mod you need to obtain a license key in the discord: https://discord.gg/CASmzp4k5b

By downloading this mod or by hosting this mod you agree to the TOS posted in the discord which clearly outlays the do's and dont's of the mod.

Support is available in the mod discord
